description: Guiones de video para I2V. Cada script describe una transición/acción de 3-5 segundos a partir de una imagen estática.

scripts.name: Office to Home - Undressing jacket
scripts.input_description: Executive woman standing, front view, wearing business suit
scripts.prompt: The woman arrives home, takes off her blazer while walking through the door, hangs it on a hook, relaxed expression, warm home interior lighting, smooth natural movement

scripts.name: Beach to City - Walking transition
scripts.input_description: Woman standing at beach in summer outfit
scripts.prompt: The woman walks forward confidently, the beach background gradually transitions to a modern city street, her outfit changes from beach wear to urban casual clothing, smooth cinematic transition, natural walking movement

scripts.name: Sportswear to Sleepwear
scripts.input_description: Athletic woman standing in gym clothes
scripts.prompt: The woman stretches her arms up, then pulls off her sports top revealing a soft cotton sleep camisole underneath, relaxes her shoulders, yawns gently, bedroom background fades in with warm lamp light, smooth cozy transition

scripts.name: Standing to Sitting
scripts.prompt: The woman gracefully sits down on a nearby chair, crossing her legs elegantly, places her hands on her knee, settles into a relaxed comfortable seated pose, smooth natural body movement, same outfit same background

scripts.name: Sitting to Lying Down
scripts.input_description: Woman sitting on couch or bed
scripts.prompt: The woman slowly leans to the side and lies down on the couch, stretches her legs out, puts one arm behind her head, relaxed comfortable pose, smooth natural movement, same outfit, warm interior lighting

scripts.name: City Walking Confidence
scripts.input_description: Woman standing on city street in urban outfit
scripts.prompt: The woman starts walking forward with confidence, hair bouncing with each step, slight smile, city life moving around her, pedestrians passing in background, dynamic camera slightly following her, smooth forward walking motion

scripts.name: Yoga Flow Sequence
scripts.input_description: Woman in yoga outfit on mat
scripts.prompt: The woman flows through a yoga sequence, raising arms overhead into mountain pose, then slowly bending forward into forward fold, smooth graceful continuous movement, peaceful garden background, soft morning light

scripts.name: Hair Flip and Smile
scripts.prompt: The woman flips her hair to one side with a graceful head movement, then looks directly at camera and gives a warm genuine smile, wind catches her hair gently, soft golden light illuminating her face, cinematic beauty shot

scripts.name: Poolside Entry
scripts.input_description: Woman in swimwear standing near pool
scripts.prompt: The woman walks to the edge of the pool, sits down on the edge, dips her feet in the water creating small ripples, leans back on her hands enjoying the sun, smooth relaxed movement, crystal clear pool water, bright sunny day

scripts.name: Morning Routine - Coffee
scripts.input_description: Woman in sleepwear or casual morning outfit
scripts.prompt: The woman reaches for a coffee mug on the kitchen counter, picks it up with both hands, brings it close to her face, takes a sip with closed eyes savoring the moment, opens eyes with a satisfied smile, warm kitchen morning light streaming through window
